member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.Bind
member.summary: Fluent API for creating type binding specifications. Enables binding concrete types to interfaces for configuration retrieval.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Bind.Type``1
member.summary: Starts building a binding specification for the given concrete type.
member.returns: A builder to define interface bindings

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingBuilder`1
member.summary: Builder for creating binding specifications with fluent interface syntax.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingBuilder`1.To``1
member.summary: Binds the concrete type to the specified interface.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingBuilder`1.Build
member.summary: Builds the binding specification.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingBuilder`1.op_Implicit(Cocoar.Configuration.BindingBuilder{`0})~Cocoar.Configuration.BindingSpec
member.summary: Implicit conversion to BindingSpec for convenience.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingRegistry
member.summary: Registry that manages type binding mappings, allowing interface types to resolve to concrete types.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingRegistry.TryGetConcreteType(System.Type,System.Type@)
member.summary: Tries to find the concrete type for the given interface type.
member.param: The interface type to look up
The mapped concrete type, if found
member.returns: True if a mapping exists, false otherwise

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingRegistry.GetConcreteTypeOrSelf(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the concrete type for the given interface type, or returns the original type if no mapping exists.
member.param: The requested type (could be interface or concrete)
member.returns: The concrete type to use for deserialization

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingSpec
member.summary: Implementation of IBindingSpec that defines a concrete type and the interfaces it can be bound to.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.BindingSpec.#ctor(System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Type})
member.summary: Implementation of IBindingSpec that defines a concrete type and the interfaces it can be bound to.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.ChangeSubscriptionManager
member.summary: Manages reactive subscriptions to configuration changes and handles cleanup.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ChangeSubscriptionManager.CreateSubscriptions(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Cocoar.Configuration.RuleManager},System.Action{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates subscriptions to rule manager changes that trigger recomputation.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ChangeSubscriptionManager.DisposeAllSubscriptions
member.summary: Disposes all current subscriptions.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigManager
member.summary: Manages configuration retrieval and orchestrates rule-based configuration processing. Refactored to use focused helper classes for better maintainability.

member.name: P:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigManager.Rules
member.summary: Gets the configuration rules that define where configurations come from.

member.name: P:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigManager.Bindings
member.summary: Gets the binding specifications that define interface mappings.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationAnalyzer
member.summary: Provides basic analysis and validation for configuration rules.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationAnalyzer.AnalyzeDependencies(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigRule},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Performs basic dependency analysis on configuration rules. Warns about potential missing dependencies during rule setup.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates the configuration computation process across multiple rule managers. Handles the recomputation logic and merging of configurations from different providers.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationOrchestrator.RecomputeAllConfigurationsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Cocoar.Configuration.RuleManager},Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigManager,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Recomputes all configurations from the provided rule managers.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationOrchestrator.RecomputeAllConfigurationsSafe(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Cocoar.Configuration.RuleManager},Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigManager,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Safely recomputes all configurations with locking to prevent concurrent modifications.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository
member.summary: Repository for storing and retrieving configuration data by type. Handles the storage logic and type resolution for configurations.

member.name: P:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.CurrentConfigurations
member.summary: Gets the current configuration dictionary (or pending if available). Thread-safe access to avoid race conditions.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.BeginUpdate
member.summary: Starts a configuration update session, allowing incremental updates.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.UpdateConfiguration(System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Adds or updates a configuration during an update session.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.CommitUpdate(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Commits all pending changes atomically.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.RollbackUpdate
member.summary: Abandons any in-progress pending update without committing changes.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.FindRegistration``1
member.summary: Finds a configuration registration by concrete type.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.FindRegistration(System.Type)
member.summary: Finds a configuration registration by concrete type. Thread-safe to avoid race conditions.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.TryGetConfiguration``1(System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Tries to get a configuration value by type.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.TryGetConfiguration(System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Tries to get a configuration value by type. Thread-safe to avoid race conditions with volatile fields.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigurationRepository.GetConfigurationAsJson(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets configuration as JSON element for the specified type.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.Fluent.IConfigRuleBuilder
member.summary: Marker for fluent builders that can produce a ConfigRule.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Fluent.IConfigRuleBuilder.BuildRules
member.summary: Builds the rule sequence (currently always a single rule; retained for API stability).

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Fluent.ProviderRuleBuilder`3.op_Implicit(Cocoar.Configuration.Fluent.ProviderRuleBuilder{`0,`1,`2})~Cocoar.Configuration.ConfigRule
member.summary: Implicit conversion to ConfigRule for convenience in collection expressions

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.IBindingSpec
member.summary: Represents a type binding specification that maps interface types to a concrete implementation type. Used by ConfigManager to enable interface-based configuration retrieval.

member.name: P:Cocoar.Configuration.IBindingSpec.ConcreteType
member.summary: The concrete type that will be instantiated and deserialized from configuration.

member.name: P:Cocoar.Configuration.IBindingSpec.BoundInterfaces
member.summary: The interface types that can be used to retrieve this concrete type.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Json.JsonPath.WrapIfNeeded(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Wraps element under nested objects for a colon-separated path. "a:b:c" -> { "a": { "b": { "c": element } } }

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Json.JsonPath.SelectColonDelimited(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Public helper used by pipeline to select a colon-delimited path; throws if not found.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.ProviderRegistry
member.summary: Registry for sharing provider instances across rules, keyed by ProviderType + InstanceOptions.GenerateProviderKey(). Manages reference counts and disposes providers when the last lease is released.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Providers.Abstractions.ConfigurationProvider.SelectByPath(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Select a nested property by colon-separated path. Returns empty object if path not found.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Providers.EnvironmentVariableProvider.EnvironmentVariableRuleOptions.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Create options for the environment variable provider. environmentPrefix filters environment variables by the given prefix (e.g. "MYAPP_").

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Providers.EnvironmentVariableProvider.EnvironmentVariableRuleOptions.FromPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Preferred factory with clearer names.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.RecomputeCoalescer
member.summary: Coalesces many incoming change signals into minimal recompute invocations while preserving earliest-index semantics and providing an initial debounce plus trailing pass.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.Utilities.ConfigurationDeserializer
member.summary: Utility class for JSON deserialization with custom type converters.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Utilities.ConfigurationDeserializer.Deserialize``1(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Deserializes a JSON element to the specified type with custom converters.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Utilities.ConfigurationDeserializer.Deserialize(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Type)
member.summary: Deserializes a JSON element to the specified type with custom converters.

member.name: T:Cocoar.Configuration.Utilities.JsonConfigurationProcessor
member.summary: Utility class for JSON configuration processing operations like flattening and unflattening.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Utilities.JsonConfigurationProcessor.Flatten(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Flattens a JSON element into a dictionary with colon-separated keys.

member.name: M:Cocoar.Configuration.Utilities.JsonConfigurationProcessor.Unflatten(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Reconstructs a hierarchical JSON element from a flattened dictionary.
